overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's waterfront district at night. The scene features neon-lit skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and futuristic urban architecture as the character moves from a covered promenade across a street intersection to a waterfront plaza overlooking a corporate tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with illuminated arches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered walkway beneath illuminated arches, passing holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance along the same path

entered.detail: futuristic illuminated archway structure spanning the walkway overhead with yellow lighting
large floating digital advertisements displaying various products and brands
metal safety railing separating the walkway from the water below
tall glass buildings with glowing neon windows and signage forming the city skyline

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered waterfront promenade beneath illuminated arches. Holographic billboards and neon signs line the left side while the water is visible beyond the railing on the right. A pedestrian walks ahead in the distance.

events.description: exits covered promenade into open intersection with wide street crossing
crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk while futuristic traffic waits at the light

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at Longshore Street, navigating between waiting vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan waiting at the red traffic light at the intersection
pedestrian crossing the street in the same direction ahead of the camera

entered.detail: zebra-striped pedestrian crossing painted on the asphalt road surface
red illuminated street sign indicating Longshore Street suspended over the road
large red metal structure supporting traffic signals and street signs

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway into a wide open intersection filled with holographic billboards and neon signage. The character crosses Longshore Street at the crosswalk as futuristic cars wait at the traffic lights.

events.description: turning onto sidewalk lined with palm trees and street furniture

agents.ego_description: walking along the palm tree lined sidewalk past a bus stop shelter and benches

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench at the bus stop shelter

entered.detail: tall palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge in square planters
futuristic transit shelter with glass panels and illuminated seating area
illuminated public seating at the bus stop
directional signage indicating Charter Hill district

segments.scene_description: Continuing along a palm tree-lined sidewalk in the Charter Hill district. Passing a bus stop shelter with a bench and illuminated signage while futuristic skyscrapers rise in the background.

events.description: approaching open waterfront plaza with view of water and distant tower
slowing to observe the illuminated corporate tower across the water

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront railing to look at the corporate tower across the bay

entered.detail: open paved area at the water's edge with orange safety railings
massive cylindrical skyscraper with bright spotlights near the top, visible across the water
dark water of the bay reflecting the city lights
elevated roadway or monorail track spanning across the water

segments.scene_description: Reaching an open waterfront plaza overlooking the bay. The view opens up to show a massive cylindrical corporate tower with bright spotlights across the water, surrounded by the dark silhouettes of Night City's skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban promenade into the expansive, neon-drenched openness of a corporate waterfront district. It begins beneath illuminated arches along a covered walkway, where holographic billboards line the path and the bay is visible beyond a railing. As the camera exits the shelter, the scene opens into a wide intersection at Longshore Street, crossing through a dense cluster of neon signage and waiting futuristic vehicles. The movement then shifts toward a palm tree-lined sidewalk in Charter Hill, passing a glowing bus stop shelter as towering skyscrapers rise into the night sky. Finally, the path leads into an open waterfront plaza, where the view expands across the dark bay toward a massive cylindrical corporate tower illuminated by bright spotlights.
